nodes.name: Webhook — Booking Confirmed
nodes.notes: Triggered when a booking is confirmed. Can also be called from workflow 03 via HTTP Request. Payload: { guestName, guestPhone, checkin, checkout, bookingId, propertyId }

nodes.name: Set — Store Guest Data
nodes.notes: Stores guest data and pre-calculates check-in/out timestamps for Wait nodes.

nodes.name: Wait — Until H-1 Before Check-in
nodes.notes: Pauses execution until 1 day before check-in date. This is when we send pre-arrival instructions.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.guestPhone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"Halo {{ $json.guestName }}! 🌴

Besok adalah hari check-in Anda. Kami sangat senang menyambut kedatangan Anda!

🗝️ INFO CHECK-IN:
• Waktu check-in: 14:00 WITA
• Alamat: [ALAMAT VILLA]
• Google Maps: [LINK MAPS]
• Password WiFi: [WIFI_PASSWORD]

📞 Kontak darurat: {{ $env.ADMIN_PHONE }}

Selamat menikmati liburan! 🌺"}}

nodes.name: HTTP — Send Pre Check-in Info
nodes.notes: Sends check-in instructions including address, maps link, and WiFi password. Update the message template with actual villa details.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.guestPhone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"✨ PENAWARAN SPESIAL untuk Anda {{ $json.guestName }}!

🍳 Paket sarapan romantis: +150.000/orang
🏊 Private pool session sore: +200.000
🛵 Sewa motor 24 jam: +100.000/unit
💆 In-villa massage: +350.000/orang

Persan sebelum besok dan dapatkan 10% diskon! Balas pesan ini untuk booking. 🌟"}}

nodes.name: HTTP — Send Upsell Offers
nodes.notes: Sends upsell offers alongside the check-in info. Customize with actual available services and prices.

nodes.name: Wait — During Stay (D+1)
nodes.notes: Waits until D+1 of check-in to send a mid-stay support message.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.guestPhone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"Halo {{ $json.guestName }}! 😊

Bagaimana kondisi villa dan fasilitas kami? Semoga semuanya nyaman!

Jika ada yang kurang atau butuh bantuan, langsung hubungi kami ya. Kami siap membantu 24/7! 🌟

📞 {{ $env.ADMIN_PHONE }}"}}

nodes.name: HTTP — Send Mid-Stay Support Message
nodes.notes: Checks in with the guest during their stay to ensure satisfaction and catch any issues early.

nodes.name: Wait — Until Checkout Date
nodes.notes: Waits until checkout date to send the thank you and review request.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.guestPhone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"Halo {{ $json.guestName }}! 👋

Terima kasih sudah menginap bersama kami! Kami harap Anda mendapatkan pengalaman yang luar biasa. 🌺

⭐ Maukah Anda meluangkan 2 menit untuk memberikan ulasan?

📝 Airbnb: [AIRBNB_REVIEW_LINK]
📝 Google: [GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK]

Ulasan Anda sangat berarti bagi kami dan membantu tamu lain! 🙏

Sampai jumpa lagi di Bali! 🌴"}}

nodes.name: HTTP — Send Thank You + Review Request
nodes.notes: Sends thank you message and review request links on checkout day. Replace AIRBNB_REVIEW_LINK and GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK with actual URLs.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Tag Guest for Retargeting
nodes.notes: Saves guest to Guests sheet and tags as 'past_guest' for future retargeting campaigns.

main.node: HTTP — Send Thank You + Review Request
Google Sheets — Tag Guest for Retargeting

meta.description: Full guest journey: pre check-in info → upsell offers → mid-stay support → checkout review request → retargeting tag. Uses Wait nodes for time-based triggers. Env vars: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN, ADMIN_PHONE, GOOGLE_SHEET_ID.
